Text00._value: Client Log Collection Consent Request for Game Optimization\n\n

Text01._value: In order to improve the performance of the game and investigate specific issues that could occur,\n

Text02._value: we would like to collect additional information about your PC environment.\n\n

Text03._value: We would like to collect information about your operating system, CPU, memory, and shader use.\n

Text04._value: In addition, we would like to also collect details about your current game status and account used.\n

Text05._value: This includes: frames per second, current map information, world, level\n

Text06._value: and job status of your character.\n

Text07._value: This information will only be used to help our teams investigate\n

Text08._value: when specific issues occur in your client.\n\n

Text09._value: Collecting this data should not cause any latency issues\n

Text10._value: or otherwise interfere with your normal game play.\n\n

Text11._value: Do you wish to consent to this data collection?\n

Text12._value: (You may change this selection anytime through the in-game Options menu.)
